data.label: Filament
data.description: Filament 是一个基于物理的实时渲染引擎，适用于 Android、iOS、Linux、macOS、Windows 和 WebGL。它被设计为在 Android 上尽可能小且尽可能高效。

data.label: Filament
data.description: Filament is a physically-based real-time rendering engine for Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, Windows, and WebGL. It is designed to be as small and efficient as possible on Android.
